# SolBeat Cleaning Inc.

> Residential and commercial cleaning services in Steinbach, Manitoba, Canada.
> A one-woman company founded by Beatrice Akinleye, serving the Eastman region:
> Steinbach, Mitchell, Blumenort, La Broquerie, Kleefeld, Giroux, Ste. Anne,
> New Bothwell, Grunthal, Niverville, and Landmark.

Motto: "We don't cut corners. We clean them."

Key facts:
- Founder: Beatrice Akinleye (Founder & CEO) — over a decade of experience in
  cleaning, quality assurance, and operations; post-graduate certificates in
  Quality Assurance, Manufacturing Management, and Supply Chain Management
  (Conestoga College).
- Address: 300 First St, Steinbach, MB R5G 0T6, Canada
- Phone: +1 (204) 381-8505
- Hours: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, 7 days a week
- Free written estimates; insured, background-checked, and trained.
- Guarantee: report any concern within 24 hours and it is corrected at no
  extra charge.
- Payment: cash, credit/debit, e-transfer, or secure online card payment
  (Stripe); due after service unless on a recurring plan.

## Pages

- [Home](https://solbeatcleaning.online/): Overview of cleaning services in Steinbach
- [About](https://solbeatcleaning.online/about): Beatrice Akinleye's background and the company philosophy
- [Residential](https://solbeatcleaning.online/residential): House cleaning — move in/out, spring cleaning, one-time and recurring cleans, detail dusting, kitchen appliances, bathrooms, junk removal
- [Commercial](https://solbeatcleaning.online/commercial): Commercial cleaning — common areas, recurring contracts, pipeline cleaning, junk removal
- [Blog](https://solbeatcleaning.online/blog): Practical cleaning guides and checklists
- [Contact](https://solbeatcleaning.online/contact): Free estimate form, map, hours, and FAQ
- [Privacy Policy](https://solbeatcleaning.online/privacy)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://solbeatcleaning.online/terms)
